resources.title: Milestone
resources.note: 2026-04-17T18:03:00+01:00 — Delegated complex tasks into isolated sessions

nodes.label: v3m2 · Approval gate reduces blast radius

resources.title: Insight
resources.note: 2026-04-17T18:07:00+01:00 — Policy checks before high-impact actions

nodes.label: v3m3 · Map becomes primary traceability layer

resources.title: Decision
resources.note: 2026-04-17T19:14:00+01:00 — All meaningful chats/actions should be logged chronologically with node links

nodes.label: v3m4 · Browser workflow locked to direct CDP

resources.title: Decision
resources.note: 2026-04-17T19:21:00+01:00 — Use Windows Chrome remote debugging profile=windows by default; stop defaulting to browser relay

nodes.label: v3m5 · Live map verified over Windows CDP

resources.title: Milestone
resources.note: 2026-04-17T19:26:00+01:00 — Confirmed direct visual load of GitHub Pages map and chronology in remote debugging session

nodes.label: v3m6 · Chronology now has dual role

resources.title: Insight
resources.note: 2026-04-17T19:26:30+01:00 — Map acts as architecture view + auditable message/action timeline for Andrew collaboration

resources.title: Milestone
resources.note: 2026-04-17T19:36:00+01:00 — Added button-driven time-range walkthrough that auto-plays chronology achievements

nodes.label: v3m8 · Voice narration linked to demo run

resources.title: Milestone
resources.note: 2026-04-17T19:50:00+01:00 — Run demo now speaks each chronology step aloud for selected time period

resources.title: Idea
resources.note: 2026-04-17T20:00:00+01:00 — Project direction reframed as a methodology for onboarding humans and agents of any ability into effective collaboration

nodes.label: v3m10 · Funnel stages formalized with interaction-mapping emphasis

resources.title: Decision
resources.note: 2026-04-17T20:02:00+01:00 — Added 7-stage onboarding funnel in UI while preserving explicit focus on mapping our interactions and chronology traceability

resources.title: Milestone
resources.note: 2026-04-17T21:20:00+01:00 — Human-agent interaction failure modes now documented with signals and mitigations for onboarding and demos

nodes.label: v3m12 · Differentiate Agent Mode vs Traditional Chat

resources.title: Decision
resources.note: 2026-04-17T21:22:00+01:00 — Added explicit interaction-mode split so execution capabilities are distinct from advisory chat behavior

nodes.label: v3m13 · Resources library for videos + insights

resources.title: Milestone
resources.note: 2026-04-17T21:27:00+01:00 — Added resource mapping panel to capture YouTube references, key insights, and node links

resources.title: Incident
resources.note: 2026-04-17T21:32:00+01:00 — Memory indicates prior cross-read success for UI-related MCP rows, but current runtime DB verification fails with tenant/user mismatch and needs credential path refresh

resources.title: Idea
resources.note: 2026-04-17T22:03:00+01:00 — Track token usage and API threshold alerts across sessions to catch budget/limit pressure early

resources.title: Milestone
resources.note: 2026-04-18T07:16:00+01:00 — Added per-session token usage cards, threshold bands (70/85/95%), and alert states directly in the map UI

resources.title: Milestone
resources.note: 2026-04-18T07:39:00+01:00 — Map now fetches token/API usage from a live JSON feed with auto-refresh and fallback handling for demos

nodes.label: v3m18 · Imperial AI programme mapped for benchmarking

resources.title: Insight
resources.note: 2026-04-18T17:35:00+01:00 — Captured brochure-derived structure (modules, audience, agentic/recruitment angle, delivery model) to benchmark against Andrew’s training offer design

resources.title: Milestone
resources.note: 2026-04-18T17:47:00+01:00 — Added video resource for 2026 business AI workflow demand signals and extracted practical positioning takeaways for Andrew's offer design

nodes.label: v3m20 · State-of-the-art agent harness optimisation focus

resources.title: Insight
resources.note: 2026-04-18T18:16:00+01:00 — Logged new video thread as agent harness optimisation research for map evolution and operating model maturity (not AI training-offer framing)

resources.title: Insight
resources.note: 2026-04-18T18:34:00+01:00 — Andrew highlighted a dual-layer pattern where a meta-agent optimises/trains specialist task agents that become masters of a narrow domain

resources.title: Milestone
resources.note: 2026-04-18T19:16:00+01:00 — Built a separate mindmap lab prototype focused on interactive node-centric navigation, parent/child/jump structure, and 2D/3D force layouts for harness optimisation exploration

nodes.label: v3m23 · Red/Green philosophy added to side-map

resources.title: Insight
resources.note: 2026-04-18T19:18:00+01:00 — Integrated Red/Green visual mode into the side-map prototype to distinguish scale-ready paths from risk/review zones in agent harness design

nodes.label: v3m24 · No-drift discipline set as permanent

resources.title: Decision
resources.note: 2026-04-18T19:31:00+01:00 — Andrew set incremental improvement with zero unintended change as a permanent operating rule; removed optionality/toggle framing for Red-Green behaviour in side-map prototype

nodes.label: v3m25 · Scratch side-map rebuilt for clarity

resources.title: Milestone
resources.note: 2026-04-18T19:41:00+01:00 — Rebuilt side-map from scratch with white background, single-root start, horizontal oval blue nodes, floating labels, and direct add parent/child/jump controls

resources.title: Decision
resources.note: 2026-04-18T23:32:00+01:00 — Adjusted side-map to keep all node rendering in top half with independent zoom scope, while selectors/controls remain fixed in a separate lower pane

resources.title: Incident
resources.note: 2026-04-22T07:09:00+01:00 — Andrew reported the assistant had gone down and confirmed service was brought back up

resources.title: Milestone
resources.note: 2026-04-22T07:12:00+01:00 — Synced from James-prefixed scratch-map (`j-mindmap-lab-thebrain-3d.html`) and set rule that each collaborator starts from the other's latest version before continuing

resources.title: Insight
resources.note: 2026-04-22T07:14:00+01:00 — Diff review showed a major shift from flat scratchpad to nested/fractal navigation with enter/exit levels, breadcrumb trail, draggable split, and tabbed control panels

nodes.label: v3m30 · Dual workstream merge strategy required

resources.title: Decision
resources.note: 2026-04-22T07:21:00+01:00 — Andrew defined two concurrent tracks—software development and map population—and agreed to formal merge guardrails to prevent conflicts/data loss during parallel work

nodes.label: v3m31 · Global Configurator baseline separated from content

resources.title: Milestone
resources.note: 2026-04-22T07:39:00+01:00 — Created Global Configurator baseline map with requested top-level Andrew/work/personal/agents/Andy structure and moved starter content into external JSON (`prototypes/data/global-configurator.base.json`) to separate software from population data

nodes.label: v3m32 · Concurrency design deferred; proposals documented

resources.title: Decision
resources.note: 2026-04-22T07:53:00+01:00 — Andrew chose to continue single-editor mode for now and requested proposal logging only; documented future merge/concurrency options without implementing process changes

nodes.label: v3m33 · Global Configurator mobile-style tabs and scoped save flow

resources.title: Decision
resources.note: 2026-04-22T08:02:00+01:00 — Andrew requested mobile-style lower controls inspired by the parametric configurator and set a two-tab model: Save (JSON import/export) and Main Control (parent/child/jump edits), with save scope bound to current nested map level

nodes.label: v3m34 · Global Configurator reset to generic base

resources.title: Decision
resources.note: 2026-04-22T19:05:00+01:00 — Stripped map content back to base state by removing predefined child/jump structure and replacing specific names with a single generic default focus node

resources.title: Decision
resources.note: 2026-04-22T19:20:00+01:00 — Andrew requested full-spectrum mapping in Global Configurator; documented collaboration protocol and everything-mapping model to standardize app/data workflow and capture cadence

nodes.label: v3m36 · Agent-centric language removed from mapping docs

resources.title: Decision
resources.note: 2026-04-22T19:28:00+01:00 — Andrew reiterated the map is for everything, not just agents; updated collaboration and mapping model docs to explicitly frame personal/work/projects/decisions/resources as first-class scope with agents/tools as one category
